    • Understanding the NFTab Specification

Create a ref encoding

nf_ref_encoding.Rd

Declares that a feature is stored in an external resource, resolved via a backend adapter.

Usage

nf_ref_encoding(
  backend = NULL,
  locator = NULL,
  selector = NULL,
  resource_id = NULL,
  checksum = NULL
)

Arguments

backend

Backend identifier or nf_col reference.

locator

Path/URI or nf_col reference.

selector

Optional selector (literal or nf_col reference).

resource_id

Optional resource registry ID (literal or nf_col reference).

checksum

Optional checksum (literal or nf_col reference).

Value

An nf_encoding object with type = "ref".

On this page
